title: selaginella flexuosa
intro: Selaginella flexuosa, also known as the flexible spikemoss, is a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella flexuosa include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and protect against infections. Selaginella flexuosa is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction and is used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
